login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your work email and password. Accounts are provisioned by an administrator.
login.serverUnavailable: Cannot reach the server. Please try again.

dashboard.employeeSubtitle: Report your safety status immediately when a disaster strikes.
dashboard.managerSubtitle: Check your own status and watch over your team.

noActiveEvent.title: No active events
noActiveEvent.description: When your company declares an emergency, you'll see the report button here and get a real-time notification.
noActiveEvent.footer: Connected — new events will arrive automatically.

report.title: {title}
report.messagePlaceholder: Add a message to your manager (e.g. 'I'm trapped on floor 3 in building B')
report.submittedNeedHelp: Reported as need-help — your manager has been notified

team.noEventLabel: No active event. You can still browse your team's contact info.

unreported.title: Unreported team members
unreported.allReported: All team members have reported. All good.

reminderToast.self: Reminder: please report your safety status
reminderToast.manager: Reminder: {count} of your reports haven't checked in
reminderToast.newEventDescription: Please report your safety status now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: View your account information and preferences.
settings.accountInfoNote: Created by an administrator. Contact admin to update.
settings.name: Name
settings.languageDescription: Switch the interface language (only affects your browser).

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: HuYouAn needs an internet connection to report in real time. Check your network and try again.
